parameters.content:
## Engineering Digest for PMs

**Setup:**
1. Create YOUR_OPENAI_CREDENTIAL and YOUR_SMTP_CREDENTIAL
2. Set DIGEST_EMAIL_TO and configure weekly schedule
3. Feed engineering activity (PRs, incidents, deployments) or use sample
4. LLM translates engineering activity into a PM-readable weekly digest
5. Approval gate before digest is distributed

parameters.jsCode:
const { digest: d, meta: m } = $input.first().json;
const fmt = (arr, fn) => (arr||[]).map(fn).join('\n') || '  (none)';
const report = [
  d.digest_title,
  `Generated: ${m.generated_at}`,
  ``,
  `TL;DR: ${d.tldr}`,
  ``,
  `WHAT SHIPPED:`,
  fmt(d.what_shipped, s => `  • ${s.item}\n    Customer impact: ${s.customer_impact}`),
  ``,
  `WHAT BROKE & IS FIXED:`,
  fmt(d.what_broke_and_is_fixed, i => `  • ${i.incident} [${i.status.toUpperCase()}]\n    Customer impact: ${i.customer_impact}`),
  ``,
  `WHAT ENGINEERING IS DOING:`,
  fmt(d.what_engineering_is_doing, w => `  • ${w.work}\n    Why it matters: ${w.why_it_matters}`),
  ``,
  `NEXT WEEK: ${d.next_week_preview}`,
  d.action_required_from_pm ? `\nACTION REQUIRED FROM PM: ${d.action_required_from_pm}` : '',
].join('\n');
return [{ json: { ...($input.first().json), report_text: report } }];
